publishedAbstract: Ceph MDS crashes with following assert: ~~~ debug-1> 2024-10-01T07:04:03.737+0000 7f027f171700-1 /builddir/build/BUILD/ceph-16.2.10/src/mds/OpenFileTable.cc: In function 'void OpenFileTable::_load_finish(int, int, int, unsigned int, bool, bool, ceph::bufferlist&, std::map, ceph::buffer::v15_2_0::list> &)' thread 7f027f171700 time 2024-10-01T07:04:03.737500+0000 /builddir/build/BUILD/ceph-16.2.10/src/mds/OpenFileTable.cc: 823: FAILED ceph_assert(omap_num_objs == num_objs) ceph version 16.2.10-208.el8cp (791f73fbb4bbca2ffe53a2ea0f8706dbffadcc0b) pacific (stable) 1: (ceph::__ceph_assert_fail(char const*, char const*, int, char const*)+0x158) [0x7f028ddcb534] 2: /usr/lib64/ceph/libceph-common.so.2(+0x27974e) [0x7f028ddcb74e] 3: (OpenFileTable::_load_finish(int, int, int, unsigned int, bool, bool, ceph::buffer::v15_2_0::list&, std::map, std::allocator >, ceph::buffer::v15_2_0::list, std::less, std::allocator > >, std::allocator, std::allocator > const, ceph::buffer::v15_2_0::list> > > &)+0x1985) [0x555ef5a48a95] 4: (C_IO_OFT_Load::finish(int)+0x3f) [0x555ef5a4ceef] 5: (MDSContext::complete(int)+0x203) [0x555ef5a17f73] 6: (MDSIOContextBase::complete(int)+0x6ac) [0x555ef5a1871c] 7: (Finisher::finisher_thread_entry()+0x1a5) [0x7f028de6da15] 8: /lib64/libpthread.so.0(+0x81ca) [0x7f028cdaa1ca] 9: clone() ~~~
